editableNewDialogue.text: 我想把一封商务邮件写得更正式一点，你能帮我润色吗？
可以。请把邮件原文贴出来，并说明：收件人关系（客户/供应商/同事）、语气（正式/中性/友好正式）、以及是否需要加入附件说明和下一步行动（例如电话会议或确认交期）。
另外，如果邮件里提到货款余额，英文里用“balance”还是“outstanding amount”更合适？

两者都可用：
- balance：更简洁，常见于对账/付款提醒，例如 “The remaining balance is USD 9,000.”
- outstanding amount：更偏“未结清款项”，在催款语境更正式一些，例如 “The outstanding amount is USD 9,000.”
如果要更礼貌，也可用 “outstanding balance”。
顺便问下，FHA展一般是每年都有吗？

FHA（Food & Beverage）通常是新加坡举办的大型餐饮食品展会，常见安排是按年度或隔年举办，但具体年份可能会因主办方安排而调整。最稳妥的做法是以其官网公布的展期与参展指南为准。
（题外话：有些展会会把同一品牌拆成“Food & Beverage”和“HoReCa”等不同主题展区，报名入口也会分开。）
好的。再给我两个表达“时间比较紧”的英文说法，邮件里用。

可以，这里是两个更商务的写法：
1) The timeline is quite tight, so we would appreciate your prompt confirmation.
2) Due to the limited time available, we may need to proceed on an expedited schedule.
也可更委婉：“We are working on a tight schedule.”
我准备把这封英文邮件直接抄送给Mr. Francesco，他下周在西班牙要和buyers开会讨论新项目；邮件里帮我顺便加一句：如果他们需要我们调整包装规格，也可以告诉我们。

Dear [Customer Name],

Thank you for your message and for confirming that our quotation and specifications have been well received.

We understand that Mr. Francesco is currently in Spain and will be meeting with buyers next week to discuss the new project. Please take your time to review our pricing and specifications, and we look forward to your feedback for further discussion.

In the meantime, if any packaging specifications need to be adjusted to better match the project requirements, please feel free to let us know.

Your patience and support are highly appreciated. If there is anything else we can assist you with, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
刚刚我看了下我们写给客户的那段话，可能有误：我们和毛里求斯这个客户不是从2015年开始的，是从2018年才开始合作的。麻烦把那句“since 2015 / past eight years”改成从2018算起（five years）。

好的，我把年份和时长更正为2018年起、五年：

It was such a delightful surprise to see you at the FHA food exhibition in Singapore. As one of our most important long-term clients in the Mauritian market, we would like to express our heartfelt gratitude for your continuous support over the past five years since 2018.
